case_title: JH PORTFOLIO DEBT EQUITIES, LLC VS. RAFAEL SALAZAR ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JH PORTFOLIO DEBT EQUITIES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SALAZAR, RAFAEL , AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 THROUGH 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-07-2019
